stemHtml: Select the correct statement with regard to positively cambered aerofoils.

options.a: The angle of attack will have a positive value when the lift coefficient equals zero.
options.b: They will always have a negative lift coefficient at all angles of attack.
options.c: The angle of attack will have a negative value when the lift coefficient equals zero.
options.d: They will always have a positive lift coefficient at all angles of attack.
